ar.err.invalid_response: SwitchBot Cloud returned an unexpected payload.
ar.err.invalid_arguments: Either device_id or device_name is required.
ar.err.not_found: No SwitchBot device matched the provided device_id.

ar.err.unsupported_device: The selected device type does not support the requested action.

ar.err.invalid_value_range: The value field must be between 0 and 100.
ar.err.invalid_value_type: The value field must be an integer.

nl.err.config_missing: SwitchBot Cloud credentials are missing. Set UAGENT_SWITCHBOT_TOKEN and UAGENT_SWITCHBOT_SECRET.

pl.err.invalid_response: SwitchBot Cloud returned an unexpected payload.
pl.err.invalid_arguments: Either device_id or device_name is required.
pl.err.not_found: No SwitchBot device matched the provided device_id.
pl.err.ambiguous_target: Multiple SwitchBot devices matched the provided device_name.
pl.err.unsupported_device: The selected device type does not support the requested action.
pl.err.value_required: The value field is required for set_value.
pl.err.invalid_value_range: The value field must be between 0 and 100.
pl.err.invalid_value_type: The value field must be an integer.
